title: Wicked Briny Croatian Cabbage Stew
description: A smoky, briny stew of white cabbage and vegetables that shows off in a copper mug, vegan and packed with flavor.
instructions: Heat the copper mug and add olive oil, letting it swirl around the sides.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until the onion turns translucent.
Stir in diced carrot and thinly sliced cabbage, cooking for 2 minutes to soften the vegetables.
Pour in vegetable broth, then season with sea salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, then cover the mug and let it cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add fresh dill and a splash of lemon juice, stirring to combine and brighten the flavor.
Taste and adjust the seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed.
Serve directly from the copper mug, letting steam rise in a dramatic display.
The stew can be garnished with extra dill or a twist of lemon for a fresh finish.
Enjoy the briny, smoky cabbage stew as a hearty, vegan dinner that dazzles your senses.
